name: Faraday
tagline: Faraday is a powerful, open-source, web-based vulnerability management tool.
description:
Faraday is a powerful, open-source, web-based vulnerability management tool.

Docs: https://faradaysec.com/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:latest
    volumes:
      - faraday-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=8a5a1fdeda2f2b7eb38dcda5639d9410
      - POSTGRES_USER=u6f3e736562
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-faraday}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-faraday} -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-livacc469df}
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
  redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: --save 60 1 --loglevel warning
    volumes:
      - redis:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - redis-cli ping | grep PONG
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
  faraday:
    image: faradaysec/faraday:latest
    entrypoint: /entrypoint.sh
    environment:
      - AUTHENTIK_POSTGRESQL__PASSWORD=8a5a1fdeda2f2b7eb38dcda5639d9410
      - PGSQL_USER=u6f3e736562
      - PGSQL_PASSWD=8a5a1fdeda2f2b7eb38dcda5639d9410
      - PGSQL_DBNAME=${POSTGRES_DB:-faraday}
      - PGSQL_HOST=postgresql
      - REDIS_SERVER=redis
    volumes:
      - faraday:/home/faraday/.faraday:rw
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - nc
        - -z
        - localhost
        - '5985'
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42031:5985
volumes:
  faraday-db: null
  redis: null
  faraday: null
